resources.title: PennPay
resources.description: PennPay is Penn's official student billing and payment portal. Use it to view your account balance, make tuition and fee payments, set up a payment plan, or grant a parent access as an authorized payer.
resources.intent: Pay my tuition bill, view my student account balance, set up a payment plan, add a parent as an authorized payer, pay housing or dining fees

resources.title: Handshake
resources.description: Handshake is Penn's career platform where students and alumni find internships, full-time jobs, and on-campus recruiting events. Employers post positions directly and students can apply, schedule interviews through Career Services, and attend info sessions.
resources.intent: Find internships, search for full-time jobs, sign up for on-campus recruiting, connect with employers, attend career fairs or info sessions
